summary: Frontend-only testing complete for Philos Orientation app. All 6 requested features verified and working correctly. Compass position calculation uses last 7 days, recommendation engine follows theory balancing paths strictly, Theory tab displays correct balancing paths, Home tab shows recommendations with correct direction labels, Orientation Compass renders without errors, and tab navigation works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: calculateCompassPosition (line 272) correctly filters to last 7 days using sevenDaysAgo date comparison
GOOD: calculateCompassPosition uses weighted averaging (weight = Math.max(0.3, 1 - (index * 0.05))) for recency
GOOD: calculateRecommendation (line 596) implements STRICT theory balancing paths: harmвЖТrecovery, avoidanceвЖТorder, isolationвЖТcontribution, rigidityвЖТexploration
GOOD: TheorySection.js displays all 4 balancing paths with correct data-testid attributes (path-harm-recovery, path-avoidance-order, etc.)
GOOD: OrientationCompassSection.js uses centralized calculateCompassPosition from recommendationService.js
GOOD: HomeNavigationSection.js uses centralized calculateRecommendation from recommendationService.js
GOOD: All components use same theoretical model (theoryBalancingPaths, positiveReinforcement exports)
GOOD: Fixed undefined variable bug - recommendedArrow used correctly in OrientationCompassSection.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features implemented correctly. Theory tab is visible with 4 directions, 2 tensions, and 4 balancing paths. Orientation Compass uses last 7 days calculation. Home tab shows recovery recommendation by default for new users. All 5 tabs navigable.

feature_3_theory_tab_display.evidence: UI shows all 4 paths with data-testid attributes: path-harm-recovery, path-avoidance-order, path-isolation-contribution, path-rigidity-exploration
